mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.name, g.english_name AS english_name, g.description, g.brand_id, b.name AS brand_name, g.series_id, s.name AS series_name, g.category_id, c.name AS category_name, g.maker_id, m.name AS maker_name, g.is_hot, g.sort, g.status, CASE WHEN g.status = 1 THEN 'Normal' WHEN g.status = 0 THEN 'Disabled' ELSE NULL END AS status_desc, g.deleted, g.created_by, g.updated_by, g.create_time, g.update_time, gs.id AS sku_id, gs.sku_code, gs.sku_name, gs.price, gs.currency, COALESCE(stock_summary.current_qty, 0) AS current_qty, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_stock st WHERE st.deleted = 0 AND st.goods_id = g.id AND st.sku_id = gs.id ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS inbound_done, COALESCE(stock_summary.current_qty, 0) AS outbound_max_qty
ORDER BY g.update_time DESC, gs.update_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
